mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, nickname, email, dept_id, phone, gender, status, must_change_password, create_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{deptId}, #{phone}, #{gender}, #{status}, #{mustChangePassword}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT role_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND status = 1
